case_title: STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPT. vs. SIVONGSAY, VANDY

docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPARTMENT

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC. 683.110 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPARTMENT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SIVONGSAY, VANDY $4,876.17 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,876.17, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $295.69 INTEREST, $26.00 COSTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPARTMENT

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPARTMENT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SIVONGSAY, VANDY $2,331.55 PRINCIPAL, $98.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,429.55
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $1,748.72 INTEREST, $.00 COSTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPARTMENT

PROOF OF SERVICE ON APPLICATION AND NOTICE OF RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPARTMENT SERVED AUG-16-2010, MAIL AS TO DEFENDANT SIVONGSAY, VANDY PROCESS COMPLETED BY DEFAULT SECTION. WRIT MAY ISSUE ON SEP-21-2010 IF NO MOTION FILED BY DEFENDANT
